signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]  
The official launch of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum is driving massive capital influx and record XRPL transaction volumes, following SEC case resolution and amid XRP ETF approvals nearing completion—key catalysts for institutional adoption and prediction market shifts.[1]
